app_engine.description: Defines the App Engine service or version for the network endpoint group. Must be specified if the group is associated with App Engine.

cloud_function.description: Specifies the serverless Cloud Function to associate with the regional network endpoint group, must be deployed in the same region.

cloud_run.description: Specifies the Cloud Run service to associate with the regional network endpoint group, required for serverless NEG configurations.

description.description: Defines the purpose or usage of the regional network endpoint group, providing context for its role within the infrastructure.

name.description: Specifies the unique name of the regional network endpoint group, must be 1-63 characters and comply with RFC1035.

network.description: Specifies the self-link or name of the VPC network to which the regional network endpoint group belongs. Must be an existing network in the same project.

network_endpoint_type.description: Specifies the type of network endpoints in the group, such as SERVERLESS, INTERNET_IP_PORT, or GCE_VM_IP_PORT; must match the backends used in the group.

psc_data.description: Specifies whether the network endpoint group is for Private Service Connect, requiring the PSC service attachment.

psc_target_service.description: Specifies the fully qualified name of the private service connect target service to associate with the regional network endpoint group. Must be in the same region as the group.

subnetwork.description: Specifies the subnetwork where the network endpoint group will be deployed. Must be in the same region as the network endpoint group.

timeouts.description: Defines the timeout durations for create, update, and delete operations of the regional network endpoint group.
